page.title: Waste
page.description: Effective waste management reduces disposal costs and improves the image of your accommodation with guests.

validation.invalidOperatingDays: The year has a maximum of 365 days.
validation.missingFields: Please complete all fields in the tables: Operational Data and Waste Streams.
validation.missingConsent: You must agree to data processing.

alerts.submitted: Data submitted. PDF generation will be added later.

consent.label: By submitting I agree to the processing of the entered data.

summary.title: What we measure?
summary.whyText: The average hotel produces 1 kg of waste per guest per night. With proper sorting, up to 80% of this volume can be recycled.
summary.quote: "There is no such thing as 'away'. When we throw anything away, it must go somewhere." — Annie Leonard
